whyNow.title: AI changes everything. And you see it.
whyNow.subtitle: You see AI news every day. ChatGPT, autonomous agents, automation... But concretely, how do you take advantage of it when running a firm, a job site, an agency? Where to start? That's exactly what we answer.
whyNow.card1Desc: Manual quotes, forgotten follow-ups, copy-paste reporting... Hours every week on tasks AI handles in seconds.
whyNow.card2Title: You don't know where to start
whyNow.card2Desc: 100 AI tools on the market, none tailored to your trade. You need an expert, not yet another subscription.
whyNow.card3Desc: While you hesitate, others are already automating. The right time to act is now.

sectors.title: We automate the tasks of your trade.
sectors.subtitle: Every sector has its repetitive tasks. We know them, we automate them.
sectors.sportPain: No-shows on classes, memberships never followed up, front desk overwhelmed during treatments.
sectors.sportSolution: We automate reminders, membership follow-ups and appointment booking.
sectors.sportAssoPain: Certificates to collect, dues never followed up, notices sent one by one.
sectors.sportAssoSolution: We automate sign-ups, follow-ups and notices. Solidarity offer from €1,000 excl. VAT.
sectors.garagePain: Missed calls in the shop, quotes never followed up, service reminders never sent.
sectors.garageSolution: We automate phone reception, quote follow-ups and service reminders.
sectors.btpPain: Manual quotes, follow-ups never sent, late invoicing.
sectors.btpSolution: We automate your quotes, follow-ups and billing. Live in 2-3 weeks.
sectors.formationPain: OPCO files stuck, attendance sheets to archive, a Qualiopi audit coming up.
sectors.formationSolution: We automate OPCO tracking, attendance and notices. You stay the decision-maker.
sectors.pharmaPain: BPM-eligible patients undetected, shortages found too late, payer rejections piling up.
sectors.pharmaSolution: We automate detection, alerts and rejection sorting. You decide and bill.
sectors.agenciesPain: Posts, newsletters, client reporting — all done by hand.
sectors.agenciesSolution: We automate content production, reporting and monitoring. Your creatives focus on creativity.
sectors.accountingPain: Reconciliation, matching, pre-entry — 30 to 240 hours lost per month.
sectors.accountingSolution: We automate accounting workflows with Mistral, French-sovereign AI, connected to your existing tools.
sectors.legalPain: Case sorting, case-law research, deadline tracking — too much time lost.
sectors.legalSolution: We automate document processing with Mistral, French-sovereign AI, without sending your documents to a US model.
sectors.outroText: Your sector not listed? The free diagnostic lets us see if we can help.

howItWorks.title: From diagnostic to result. No jargon.
howItWorks.subtitle: Four clear steps, no surprises. You know what will be done, when, and how much it costs.
howItWorks.step1Desc: 30 minutes via video call. We identify the tasks wasting your time, evaluate whether AI can help, and estimate the concrete gain. Free, no commitment.
howItWorks.step2Desc: We audit your tools, the quality of your data, and design the workflow architecture. You know exactly what will be built before you sign.
howItWorks.step3Title: We build and test on your real cases
howItWorks.step3Desc: We build the workflow, calibrate the AI on your business vocabulary, and test on 100 to 500 real cases. Not a prototype — a system that runs.
howItWorks.step4Title: We deliver, you decide what's next
howItWorks.step4Desc: The build is tested and delivered. If you want us to keep monitoring, updating and maintaining the automation, the support plan takes over — it's your call, never forced.

products.title: We don't just consult. We build.
products.subtitle: Our SaaS prove we know how to build complete products — from concept to deployment.
products.devizlyDesc: AI-powered quote and invoice platform. Factur-X compliant, electronic signature, Stripe payment.
products.vlogyzDesc: AI video editing platform. Transcription, smart cuts, subtitles, motion design, virality score.

pricing.title: Transparent. No hidden asterisks.
pricing.subtitle: Every project starts with a free 30-minute diagnostic, no commitment.
pricing.ctaButton: See the full grid and simulate your price →
pricing.footnote1: You stay owner of your stack. You own everything. If you want to leave, you keep everything.
pricing.footnote2: Infrastructure costs (n8n, Mistral, and the tools connected to your business): €80-300/month, paid directly to providers.
pricing.footnote3: NBHC support (updates, security, maintenance, training): €90 to €800/month depending on your situation, paid to NBHC. Without it, nobody monitors or updates your automation after delivery.

differentiators.title: What sets us apart.
differentiators.block1Desc: We build on Mistral, the French AI model, hosted in the EU. Third-party tools connected to your business stay yours.
differentiators.block2Desc: The price depends on exactly what you ask for — not a blended grid copied across other clients. Two custom automations here isn't priced like anywhere else: not cheaper, not pricier by default, just calculated on your actual scope.
differentiators.block3Desc: The workflow, prompts, architecture — it all belongs to you. If you leave, you keep everything.
differentiators.block4Desc: We don't sell you software and disappear. In regulated sectors, regulatory monitoring is part of the support plan — updates, maintenance and training continue for as long as you want them.

faq.title: Questions we're asked.
faq.subtitle: And if you have more, the free diagnostic is exactly for that.
faq.q1: I don't know anything about AI, is that a problem?
faq.a1: Not at all. That's exactly why we exist. We handle the entire technical side. You just explain your trade and what's taking up your time.
faq.q2: How long before I see results?
faq.a2: Between 2 and 12 weeks depending on complexity. A Quick Win (automated quotes, follow-ups) is delivered in 2-3 weeks. A more complex project (accounting reconciliation) takes 8-12 weeks.
faq.a3: A chain of automated actions. For example: an email arrives → AI reads it → classifies it → generates a reply → submits it for your validation. All without you lifting a finger.
faq.a4: The free diagnostic is precisely for that: we assess whether AI can really help in your case. If we think not, we tell you honestly. And with the Standard offer, you only pay the performance fee if results are there.
faq.a5: Yes. We use Mistral, a French AI model, hosted in the EU, GDPR-compliant.
faq.a6: ChatGPT is a generalist assistant. We build automated systems specific to your trade, connected to your tools, running 24/7 without you having to open anything.

ctaFinal.title: Ready to automate what's taking your time?
ctaFinal.subtitle: 30 minutes. Free. No commitment. Together we look at what AI can change in your day-to-day.

contact.title: Your project
contact.description: 30 minutes via video call. We identify what's wasting your time and tell you honestly whether AI can help — no technical jargon.

globalBanner.text: 🎯 Free diagnostic — 30 min to see what AI would change for you →

tarifs.h1: A price that depends on what we build. Support that lasts.
tarifs.intro: Standardised or custom: that's what sets the build price. Answer a few questions to see where you probably stand — the exact figure is always set during the free diagnostic.

blocA.title: What we build
blocA.intro: The price depends on one thing: is your automation already built at NBHC (standardised), or does it need adapting to your tools (custom)?
blocA.essentielPriceSub: depending on the number of automations and the scope
blocA.essentielDesc: A workflow already built at NBHC, configured for you, that runs without connecting to your business software. From €200 for a single automation (e.g. AI phone agent).
blocA.essentielFeature2: Pre-built workflow, configured for your business
blocA.surMesureLegerDesc: Business scripts and read/write access to your existing management software (LGO, Pennylane, Lucca, etc.). We build and test on your data.
blocA.surMesureLegerFeature2: Integration with your existing business tool
blocA.surDevisDesc: Scopes we can't price from a form: a large structure, or a custom architecture touching several tools (multi-integrations, ERP, HRIS, on-premise). We scope it together, then price it.
blocA.surDevisFeeNote: On custom scopes: + 30% of the measured gain, capped at 2x the build amount.
blocA.assoNote: Non-profit sports club (French "loi 1901")? Managing sign-ups and certificates/licenses — normally Light Custom, from €2,000 excl. VAT — starts at €1,000 excl. VAT for a non-profit: a solidarity rate designed for a volunteer board.
blocA.assoCondition: Simpler automations (dues follow-up, notices) stay at the standard Essential rate, from €200 excl. VAT — no extra discount needed, they're already accessible.

blocB.title: What we maintain
blocB.intro: A delivered workflow isn't a finished workflow. Four commitments, with no numeric SLA and no promise we can't keep.
blocB.pillar1Text: We monitor the state of the art in models and tools. When a more capable version exists for one of your workflows, we test it — then update it after your approval. When a new automation becomes relevant to your business, we suggest it to you.
blocB.pillar2Text: Mistral AI hosted in the European Union. Your data stays with you. Human validation on every committing action. Your instance, your data — nothing locks you in if you leave.
blocB.pillar3Text: When a third-party tool changes — a vendor changes its export, an API evolves — we fix it so the workflow keeps running. A small, responsive team, not a 24/7 call center.
blocB.pillar4Text: Initial onboarding is included in the build. If your teams change, or new automations arrive, later training sessions are covered by the support plan.
blocB.honestyIntro: Two separate recurring lines, never mixed up:
blocB.honestyInfra: Infrastructure (n8n, Mistral, and the third-party tools specific to your business): €80-300/month, paid directly to your providers — not to NBHC. Non-negotiable, it's the running cost.
blocB.honestyAccompagnement: NBHC support (the 4 pillars above): the amount depends on what actually applies to you — the size of your structure, the number of automations, standardised or custom. In regulated sectors, regulatory monitoring is included.
blocB.legendRangeDesc: Depends on the size of your structure, the number of automations, and whether they're standardised or custom.

simulator.title: The simulator
simulator.intro: A guide, not a quote. The exact figure is always set during the free diagnostic.
simulator.q4Hint: Standardised = the workflow runs on NBHC's side without connecting to your system (AI phone agent, SMS/WhatsApp reminders, Google review requests, no-show follow-up). Custom = the workflow reads or writes into your business software (LGO, management tool, stock, quotes).
simulator.accompagnementSub: Updates after your approval, security/sovereignty, maintenance, training. Uncheck to see what changes.
simulator.fallbackDontknowAutomationsMessage: "Not sure yet" is the most common answer — and the most honest one. That's exactly what we look at together in 30 minutes: we identify what's worth automating before talking tier or price.
simulator.fallbackDontknowTypeMessage: Standardised or custom: it depends on your current tools and what they let you connect to. That's also a question we settle together during the diagnostic, not before.
simulator.fallbackAssoMesureMultipleMessage: For a non-profit, several custom automations represent a significant investment. We don't want to quote a standard rate by default to an amateur club: we look together at the diagnostic for what's realistic for your budget.
simulator.tierEssentielSingleMessage: A single standardised automation (e.g. AI phone agent): the entry point of the grid.
simulator.tierEssentielRangeMessage: Several standardised automations combined: the price depends on the number chosen and the scope selected.
simulator.tierSurMesureLegerSingleMessage: An automation built specifically for your tools (business scripts, management software integration).
simulator.tierSurMesureLegerRangeMessage: Several custom automations, with integration into your business tools.
simulator.tierSurMesureLegerAssoMessage: Sign-ups + certificates/licenses: an automation that reads/writes compliance documents, so normally Light Custom — at the solidarity rate for a non-profit.
simulator.tierSurDevisMessage50plus: Your scope (50+ employees) exceeds the standard framework. We define the architecture and the quote together during the diagnostic.
simulator.tierSurDevisMessageAutomations4plus: Your scope (4 custom automations and more) exceeds the standard framework. We define the architecture and the quote together during the diagnostic.
simulator.tierSurDevisMessageMultiSitePme: Your scope (several sites in an SME, custom) exceeds the standard framework. We define the architecture and the quote together during the diagnostic.
simulator.feeNote: Performance fee: 30% of the measured gain, capped at 2x the build amount.
simulator.multiSiteNote: Several sites: the exact scope (pooled or per-site deployment) is defined together during the diagnostic.
simulator.featuresEssentiel2: Pre-built workflow, configured for your business
simulator.featuresAsso3: Solidarity rate on an automation normally in Light Custom
simulator.featuresSurMesureLeger2: Integration with your existing business tool
simulator.infraSub: n8n, Mistral, and your connected tools — paid directly to your providers
simulator.lostTitle: Without support, what you don't get
simulator.lost1: No follow-up or adjustments after the build is delivered
simulator.lost2: No update to models or tools after their release
simulator.lost3: No fix if a third-party tool changes its export or API
simulator.lost4: No training included beyond the initial onboarding
simulator.lostRegulated: No regulatory monitoring for your sector
simulator.lostKept: You keep the delivered build and the infrastructure above.
simulator.sectorSuggestedNote: No dedicated page for this sector yet — these are indicative leads, to refine together during the diagnostic.
simulator.disclaimer: Indicative estimate — the exact figure is set during the free diagnostic.
simulator.sectorAutoSport2: Smart booking that takes the load off your front desk
simulator.sectorAutoSport3: Membership renewal follow-up + inactive member reactivation
simulator.sectorAutoGarage1: AI phone agent after 3 rings + real-time schedule adaptation
simulator.sectorAutoGarage3: Smart service, inspection and maintenance reminders
simulator.sectorAutoFormation1: Centralizing evidence for the Qualiopi audit (custom)
simulator.sectorAutoFormation2: Tracking and following up funding files (custom)
simulator.sectorAutoPharma1: Detecting patients potentially eligible for a shared medication review (custom)
simulator.sectorAutoImmobilier1: Qualifying and following up incoming leads (forms, listing portals)
